title: cochlearia officinalis var. oblongifolia
intro: Cochlearia officinalis var. oblongifolia, also known as the Sea Rocket, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cochlearia officinalis var. oblongifolia include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural expectorant. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used in herbal preparations, such as salves and ointments.
